### Franco  (id 10, cost 3)

- **Class:** Dauntless, Weapon Master  ·  **Faction:** Kishin  ·  **Position:** Front-row
- **Skill (Hook Shock):** Franco launches an iron hook towards the furthest enemy, dealing (+55% Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG. He then drags the enemy back and gains a Shield equal to 10% of his Max HP.
